title: Tribunus Work State Transition Schema
description: Defines the state machines and transition rules for Tribunus work entities (campaigns, missions, lanes, tasks).

TransitionRule.description: A single transition rule governing whether a state change is allowed between two states for a given entity type.

entity_type.description: Entity type this transition rule applies to

conditions.description: Optional list of conditions that must be satisfied for the transition to be allowed

StateMachine.description: A complete state machine definition for a given entity type.

entity_type.description: Entity type this state machine governs

states.description: All valid states for this entity type

transitions.description: List of allowed and disallowed transitions

initial_state.description: The state entities of this type start in

terminal_states.description: States that represent the end of the lifecycle for this entity type

state_machines.description: Array of state machine definitions, one per entity type

validation_version.description: Version identifier for the validation ruleset
